payload.text: Go to https://www.wikipedia.org/, search for Ada Lovelace, open the article page, and report exactly this JSON: {"status":"success","title":"<article title>"}
I'll help you navigate to Wikipedia, search for Ada Lovelace, and report the article title in JSON format. Let me start by taking a screenshot to see the current state of the browser.

payload.name: computer
payload.text: Cannot access about:blank — browser system pages block extension access. Use the navigate tool to go to a regular webpage first (e.g. navigate to "https://google.com").
Let me navigate to Wikipedia first.
Good! I'm now on Wikipedia's homepage. I can see a search box in the middle of the page. Let me read the page to find the search input element.

payload.name: read_page
payload.text:
[main content area] [ref_1]
    button "Play" [ref_2]
      link "English
7,141,000+ articles" [ref_3] href="//en.wikipedia.org/"
      link "日本語
1,491,000+ 記事" [ref_4] href="//ja.wikipedia.org/"
      link "Deutsch
3.099.000+ Artikel" [ref_5] href="//de.wikipedia.org/"
      link "Русский
2 087 000+ статей" [ref_6] href="//ru.wikipedia.org/"
      link "Français
2 740 000+ articles" [ref_7] href="//fr.wikipedia.org/"
      link "Español
2.095.000+ artículos" [ref_8] href="//es.wikipedia.org/"
      link "Italiano
1.957.000+ voci" [ref_9] href="//it.wikipedia.org/"
      link "中文

      link "Português
1.165.000+ artigos" [ref_11] href="//pt.wikipedia.org/"
      link "Polski
1 685 000+ haseł" [ref_12] href="//pl.wikipedia.org/"
    button "Unlock birthday surprises on Wikipedia" [ref_13]
          searchbox "Search Wikipedia" [ref_14] type="search"
          combobox "en" [ref_15]
            option "English" (selected) value="en" [ref_16]
            option "Afrikaans" value="af" [ref_17]
            option "Shqip" value="sq" [ref_18]
            option "العربية" value="ar" [ref_19]
            option "Asturianu" value="ast" [ref_20]
            ... 71 more options
          button "Search" [ref_21]
      button "Read Wikipedia in your language" [ref_22]

[page navigation/chrome]
  button "Play" [ref_2]
  button "Unlock birthday surprises on Wikipedia" [ref_13]
        searchbox "Search Wikipedia" [ref_14] type="search"
        combobox "en" [ref_15]
          option "English" (selected) value="en" [ref_16]
          option "Afrikaans" value="af" [ref_17]
          option "Shqip" value="sq" [ref_18]
          option "العربية" value="ar" [ref_19]

Perfect! I can see the search box with ref_14. Let me use form_input to enter "Ada Lovelace" into the search box.
Now let me click the search button to search for Ada Lovelace.
Great! I can see the search has returned suggestions, and the first option is "Ada Lovelace - English mathematician (1815-1852)". Let me click on this option to open the article.

payload.name: computer
payload.text: fallback: dom click dispatched on <a> "Ada LovelaceEnglish mathematician (1815–1852)"

Perfect! I've successfully navigated to the Ada Lovelace Wikipedia article. I can see the article title at the top of the page is "Ada Lovelace". Now I need to report the exact JSON as requested.

{"status":"success","title":"Ada Lovelace"}
